info.title: Ecomapp Main-buildTime
info.description: API documentation for the Ecomapp Main-buildTime service, providing endpoints for ecommerce operations, product management, and order processing.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product listings, creation, updating, and deletion.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Manage customer orders including creation, retrieval, updating, and cancellations.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account and authentication related endpoints.

get.summary: Retrieve the shopping cart for a specific user
get.description: Fetches the current state of the shopping cart for the user identified by the userId path parameter. This includes all items currently in the cart along with quantities and pricing details.

example.message: The provided userId path parameter is invalid.

details.issue: User ID format is not recognized

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified product item with details defined in the request body to the shopping cart of the user identified by the userId path parameter. Returns the updated cart.

requestBody.description: The cart item object representing the product and quantity to add

200.description: Item successfully added to the cart

example.message: The cart item data provided is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for the specified user
post.description: Creates a new order on behalf of the user denoted by userId. This operation finalizes the user's current cart into an order and returns the order details.

example.message: Order placement request failed due to invalid userId or order state.

details.issue: User ID does not exist or is malformed

example.message: The user or the user's cart could not be found.

details.issue: No active cart found for this user

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order by orderId
get.description: Fetches detailed information about an order specified by its unique orderId, including items, status, pricing, and shipping information.

example.message: The provided orderId path parameter is invalid.

details.issue: Order ID format is not recognized

example.message: No order found with the specified orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment process with required payment details provided in the request body. Returns payment processing information or confirmation.

requestBody.description: Payment request details including amount, method, and payer information

example.message: The payment request details are invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Amount must be a positive number

example.message: The payment could not be processed due to insufficient funds or declined card.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Receives and processes webhook notifications from the payment gateway. The request body contains details about the payment event which will be validated and handled accordingly. Expected outcome is a successful processing acknowledgment or appropriate error response.

example.message: The webhook payload is missing required fields or contains invalid data.

402.description: Payment required or issue with payment status

example.message: The payment has not been completed or was declined.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product entry in the catalog. The request body should include all required product details such as name, description, price, and inventory quantity. Returns the created product information upon success.

example.name: Wireless Mouse
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI settings

example.message: Product data is incomplete or contains invalid values.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the same name or SKU already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve tracking information for an order
get.description: Fetches the current shipping and tracking details for the specified order identified by orderId. Returns tracking status, estimated delivery dates, and carrier information if available.

example.message: No tracking information available for the specified orderId.

500.description: Internal server error retrieving tracking data

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account in the system. The request body must include user details such as username, email, password, and other optional profile information. Responds with created user details upon success.

example.message: User registration data is incomplete or invalid.
A user with the given email or username already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code for the item's price, e.g., USD, EUR.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to the item.

price.description: Original price of a single item before discount.

quantity.description: Quantity of the product in the cart.

currency.description: Currency code for all items in the cart.

items.description: List of all items added to the cart.

payableAmount.description: Total amount payable after all discounts.

totalAmount.description: Total price of items before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to all items.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated (ISO 8601 format).

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user owning the cart.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to the order item.

finalPrice.description: Final price of the order item after discounts.

price.description: Original price of a single item in the order.

productId.description: Unique identifier for the product in the order.

productName.description: Name of the product in the order.

quantity.description: Quantity of this product in the order.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created (ISO 8601 format).

currency.description: Currency code used for the order.

items.description: Array of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid for the order.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order.

status.description: Current status of the order (e.g., Processing, Shipped).

totalAmount.description: Total amount for all items before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied across all order items.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated (ISO 8601 format).

userId.description: User identifier who placed the order.

amount.description: The total payment amount to be charged.

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for the payment.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the associated order.

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway used to process the payment.

paymentMethod.description: The payment method chosen by the customer.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created in ISO 8601 format.

currency.description: The currency code of the processed payment.

orderId.description: Identifier for the order related to the payment.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction.

paymentMethod.description: Method used to complete the payment.

transactionId.description: Identifier for the transaction from the payment gateway.

gatewayResponse.description: The response message from the payment gateway.

paymentId.description: Identifier for the payment associated with this webhook.

status.description: The updated status of the payment from the webhook event.

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier provided by the payment gateway.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available in stock.

category.description: Category under which the product is listed.

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price.

description.example: A high-quality wireless headset with noise cancellation.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product.

stock.description: Number of items available in stock.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase.

brand.description: The brand name of the product.

category.description: Category to which the product belongs.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time string when the product was created.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the product price.

description.example: A high-quality wireless mouse with ergonomic design.

price.description: The price of the product in the specified currency.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product out of 5.

stock.description: Number of items currently in stock.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time string for the last update of the product details.

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the shipment.

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date time in ISO 8601 format.

lastUpdated.description: Last timestamp when the tracking status was updated.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked.

status.description: Current status of the order shipment.

trackingId.description: Unique tracking ID assigned by the courier.

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active.

country.description: Country code representing the user's country.

phone.description: User's phone number in international format.

preferredCurrency.description: The preferred currency code for transactions.

active.description: Indicates if the user account is currently active.

country.description: Country code of the user's location.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the user account was created.

email.description: Registered email address of the user.

preferredCurrency.description: Currency code preferred by the user for transactions.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update made to the user account.

userType.description: Role or type of the user, such as 'admin' or 'customer'.

error.description: Brief description of the client error

status.description: HTTP status code for the error

path.description: API endpoint path where the error happened

errorCode.description: Specific error code representing the error type

details.description: List of detailed error information for each invalid field

field.description: Name of the field with the issue

issue.description: Description of the issue on the field
issue.example: Must be a valid email address

error.description: Brief description of the server error

status.description: HTTP status code for the error
